positive: A magical, symmetrical bioluminescent forest scene rendered in the style of Neo-Art Nouveau and highly detailed vector illustration. The central subject is a blooming circle mandala formed by intertwined fantasy flora (ethereal vines, glowing orchid blossoms, stylized ferns). The palette should feature deep indigo and midnight blues contrasted sharply with vibrant neon accents of cyan, emerald green, and violet. The composition must be perfectly centered and suitable for textile printing, emphasizing clean, thick outlines and high contrast. Include elements of stylized crescent moons and glowing celestial motes integrated into the floral structure. Overhead, subtle geometric constellations overlay the natural forms. High detail, perfect symmetry, sticker quality, clean silhouette.
negative: worst quality, blurry, grainy, artifact, noise, watermark, signature, text, logo, deformed, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy, jpeg artifacts, photo, realism
